criteria.name: Uses Mermaid flowchart syntax
criteria.description: The answer contains a fenced mermaid block whose first meaningful line starts with flowchart or graph.

criteria.name: Captures the requested lifecycle
criteria.description: The diagram includes request, draft, validation, and response or publish stages.

criteria.name: Readable and maintainable
criteria.description: Node IDs and labels are stable, concise, and easy to edit.

criteria.name: States assumptions briefly
criteria.description: The response includes no more than one concise assumptions sentence outside the diagram.
